summary: Tested StockBud chunked upload feature and stamp re-submission bug fix. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified - Upload page loads correctly with chunked upload support, all 4 tabs working, date inputs present.
critical_code_review_comments: Chunked upload implementation is well-structured with proper 3-step flow (init -> chunks -> finalize)
Proper cleanup of temp files in finally block after finalize
Stamp re-submission fix correctly clears old approvals and marks previous entries as 'superseded'
Frontend uses 4MB chunk size threshold which is appropriate for proxy body size limits
Upload progress indicator component exists and shows during uploads

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Upload page verified with all tabs and date inputs)

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during chunked upload tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chunked upload API fully tested. Stamp re-submission bug fix verified. Frontend upload page verified with all 4 tabs (Master Stock, Transactions, Branch Transfer, Physical Stock). Date range inputs present for transaction uploads. Verification date field present for physical stock uploads.

chunked_upload_api.POST /api/upload/chunk/{upload_id}: Uploads file chunks with progress tracking - PASSED
chunked_upload_api.invalid_file_type_rejection: Returns 400 for invalid file types - PASSED
chunked_upload_api.no_chunks_rejection: Returns 400 if finalize called without chunks - PASSED

stamp_resubmission_fix.resubmission_after_approval: Approved stamps can be re-submitted, old approval cleared - PASSED
